message:
feat(distributed): filter remote panes from upstream stream and fix session timing

Add distributed_agent_should_skip_remote_pane() checking each pane's
storage domain before processing events, preventing echo loops from
re-streaming remote-domain panes. Replace catch-all event match arm
with exhaustive variants so new event types become compile errors.

Move mark_connected() from TCP connect to post-handshake so rejected
handshakes don't falsely reset reconnect backoff. Add three integration
tests covering remote-pane skip, local-pane stream, and handshake
rejection backoff preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
